Operation 'admob.accounts.mediationGroups.mediationAbExperiments.create' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity about what is returned and what the experiment tests. Added summary and enhanced description to specify return value (MediationAbExperiment object) and clarify the purpose of testing mediation configurations for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Create an A/B testing experiment for a specified AdMob account and a mediation group. This method has limited access. If you see a 403 permission denied error, please reach out to your account manager for access.
data.summary_suggestion: Create A/B testing experiment for mediation group
data.description_suggestion: Creates a mediation A/B experiment for the specified AdMob account and mediation group to test different mediation configurations.
